notes: Valheim data accuracy round 2: fixed fish worldSources off-by-one bug (Trollfish/Giant Herring/Grouper/Coral Cod/Tetra/Northern Salmon/Pufferfish), corrected fishing bait biomes (Misty/Heavy/Sticky/Stingy/Cold), added missing biomes for Chain (Plains/Mistlands), Iron Scrap (Mistlands), Leather Scraps (Swamp/Mountain), Skeleton (Plains), and Bukeperries (Plains).
